Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating, Evidentiary, Issue Preclusion And Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $650.00 As Against Plaintiff And Plaintiff'S Counsel Of Record
Off Calendar Feb-25-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. The tentative ruling was vacated. DEFENDANT LAUNDRY LOCKER, INC.'S Motion For Terminating, Evidentiary, Issue Preclusion And Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $650.00 As Against Plaintiff And Plaintiff'S Counsel Of Record is off calendar at the request of the moving party. Judge Pro Tem: Charles Geerhart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Moton To Compel Answers To Special Interrogatories; Demand For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Oct-29-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances, Atty. Jamieson K. Fong of Stratman, Patterson & Hunter (510-457-3440) appeared for defendant moving party. No other appearances.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT LAUNDRY LOCKER, INC.'s Moton To Compel Answers To Special Interrogatories; Demand For Production Of Documents is Granted without sanctions due to lack of opposition. Plaintiff to file responses to interrogatories and documents within 20 days of date when the order is served by mail. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem Robert Kane, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302)
